Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Привет мир","ПРИВЕТ","привет","МИР" ] | where s has "мир" or s has_cs "ПРИВЕТ" | project s, up=toupper(s), lo=tolower(s)
Sql: SELECT s, UPPER(s) AS up, LOWER(s) AS lo FROM (VALUES ('Привет мир'), ('ПРИВЕТ'), ('привет'), ('МИР')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bмир\b') OR regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '\bПРИВЕТ\b')
Detail: row count: kusto=3 duck=0

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "café","café","CAFÉ" ] | summarize n=count() by g=(s =~ "café") | order by g asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT (UPPER(s) = UPPER('café')) AS g, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (VALUES ('café'), ('café'), ('CAFÉ')) AS t(s) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a.b","a..b","..","a.","b" ] | mv-expand part=split(s,".") to typeof(string) | summarize parts=count() by s | order by s asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT s, COUNT(*) AS parts FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS part FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a.b'), ('a..b'), ('..'), ('a.'), ('b')) AS t(s)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '.')) AS u(value)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY s ASC NULLS FIRST
